welcome.back:
Hello, {name}!
You're in group {group}. Welcome back! 🙂
welcome.back_with_building:
Hello, {name}!
You're in group {group} ({building}). Welcome back! 🙂
welcome.choose_building: Which campus do you study at?

menu.main: 📋 Main Menu ▪️ 📅 Schedule — show schedule for selected day (Mon–Sat or today) ▪️ ❌ Cancel — cancel current dialog (name/group) Type /menu for this message. Schedule — button below greeting or /schedule command.

buses.error: ⚠️ Failed to load schedule. Check your connection or open the link manually.
buses.error_no_driver: ⚠️ Schedule from the site is unavailable: browser (Playwright/Chromium) is not installed on the server. Run: pip install playwright && playwright install chromium. Open the link below for the current schedule.
buses.footer_campus: 📍 For now this schedule is for the college at Akademika Millionščikova.

settings_menu.title: ⚙️ Settings Choose what you want to change:

schedule.no_group: First specify campus and group: press /start.
schedule.error: ⚠️ Failed to load schedule. Try again later.
schedule.no_data: No classes for the selected period.

notifications.enabled:
🔔 Notifications enabled.
You will receive reminders 10 minutes before class starts.
notifications.disabled:
🔕 Notifications disabled.
Reminders 10 minutes before class won't be sent.

errors.invalid_group:
❌ Invalid group format!
Example: 1ИП-3-25

Try again:
errors.no_buildings: ⚠️ Failed to load campus list. Try again later.
errors.group_not_found:
❌ Group {group} not found at campus {building}.
Check spelling or choose another campus.
errors.wrong_building:
❌ Group {group} studies at {api_building}, not at {building}.
Choose the correct campus or enter another group.
errors.unknown: ⚠️ An error occurred. Try again later.
